description: §41.15.4 (a) compile-time misuse — the `pick:` field-set transform names a field ("phone") that is not present on the User struct. The type-system stage validates each pick array entry against the struct's declared field list and rejects the unknown name with E-SCHEMAFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD.
rationale: §41.15.4 normative statement: `pick: ["field", ...]` SHALL accept an array literal of bare field-name strings; the generated table-declaration SHALL include only the named fields; field names not present on the struct SHALL emit E-SCHEMAFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD (§34). Resolution: verify each pick entry matches a declared struct field name.
